query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "evoarena: tracking memory evolution for robust llm agents in dynamic e" linguistics
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (d) as it provides a canonical review of the "memory" mechanism in LLM agents, which is the core subject of the user's question regarding "EvoArena: Tracking Memory Evolution." It establishes the foundational framework for understanding how memory is externalized and managed in dynamic agent systems, serving as essential prior work for any study extending memory evolution tracking.
